summary: Iteration 13: Complete ecosystem testing passed. Backend 19/19 pytest tests passed covering all 12 requested backend features (announcements, auth, vendor flow, marketplace, multipart upload, sohba posts, profiles, gifts, AI). Frontend 8/8 UI tests passed covering pages (Sohba, Marketplace, AI Assistant, More, Homepage, Admin) and components (bottom nav, create post sheet).

fixed_issues.issue: Syntax error - announcements code block was incorrectly nested inside toggleNotifications function causing React crash
fixed_issues.fix: Moved announcements state and useEffect outside of toggleNotifications function

critical_code_review_comments: Index.tsx had a critical syntax error where code was improperly nested - FIXED
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test users with posts during backend tests. Vendor registration created in pending status.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 20 requested features tested and verified. Backend APIs working: announcements, auth, vendor registration (pending->approved flow), marketplace products (403 for non-approved vendors), multipart file upload, sohba posts with images, profile stats, gifts (requires credits), AI assistant (GPT-5.2). Frontend pages: Sohba has TikTok-style full-screen posts with categories and create FAB, Marketplace has vendor registration flow, AI Assistant has chat interface with login prompt, More page has 4 feature cards + 9 Islamic tools, Admin dashboard has 10 tabs (overview, broadcast, users, ads, user-ads, vendors, notifications, pages, revenue, settings), Bottom nav has 5 tabs with centered indicator.

frontend_tests_passed.13_sohba_page: ✅ TikTok-style feed with categories + create button
frontend_tests_passed.15_ai_assistant_page: ✅ Chat interface with GPT-5.2 + login prompt
frontend_tests_passed.16_more_page: ✅ 4 feature cards (المكافآت, المتجر, المساعد الديني, السوق) + 9 Islamic tools
frontend_tests_passed.17_homepage: ✅ Loads with announcement display area + prayer times

mocked_apis_note: AI assistant uses EMERGENT_LLM_KEY for GPT-5.2 - may return fallback error in test environment (expected behavior)
